threats.title: Request Floods
threats.description: An attacker could floods the server with request

threats.title: Account Disclosure
threats.description: If an account already exist and someone try to register with that account it will returns "This email has been registered"
threats.mitigation: Use an email verification when registering

threats.title: New STRIDE threat
threats.description: Provide a description for this threat
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Spoofing with stolen credentials
threats.description: Someone could login with stolen credentials

threats.title: Account Disclosure
threats.description: An attacker could check if a user exist by checking if the login page error returns "User not avaliable" or "Wrong Password"

threats.title: Brute Force Cracking
threats.description: An attacker can try to brute force the login page

threats.title: Malicious Change
threats.description: Someone can just modify/delete item data without any trace
threats.mitigation: Implement Audit Log to store data like IP and timestamp to a read only data base

threats.title: Change Item Data
threats.description: An attacker could change item data by modifying its value like a price of an item

threats.title: Information Security
threats.description: User data can be stolen if attacker have access to the db

threats.title: Data Tampering
threats.description: Someone can modify the data while moving trough the public internet

threats.title: Data Sniffing
threats.description: Data can be read while moving trough the public internet

threats.title: User Enumeration via Availability Check
threats.description: An attacker could use the availability check to know what email address has registered

threats.title: New STRIDE threat
threats.description: Provide a description for this threat
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Unauthorized Access
threats.description: Unauthorized user can find or access the item modification page
threats.mitigation: Use a strong RBAC, make sure admin endpoint/API is unable to be accessed without authorization

threats.title: Cart Data Tampering
threats.description: An attacker could change item count to negative or change item price
